creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fixes to build with security/cryptopp >= 6.0.0 have been incorporated in urbackup upstream as of release 2.4.9. While the ports have always built without issue, one should now be able to build urbackup-server/client from source with newer Cryptopp.

The output of `pkgconf --cflags-only-other libcryptopp` still needs to be appended to CXXFLAGS.
